title: lyonia maritima
intro: Lyonia maritima, also known as Sweet Gale, is a type of evergreen shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant compounds. The health benefits of Lyonia maritima include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and congestion, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Lyonia maritima is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
